name: ssh-remote-control
description: Persistent SSH remote control tools for Codex via MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Persistent SSH sessions and remote file tools
interface.longDescription: Operate on VPS hosts from local Codex with saved SSH profiles, persistent sessions, remote file tools, and sync.
defaultPrompt: Connect to my prod VPS and run diagnostics.
Upload this build to the remote host.
Read and patch files on the server over SSH.
